general_feedback: The @return descriptions are accurate, concise, and consistent with the existing @param/@tparam style. Each clearly states what is returned and how splice holes are filled. Only minor wording polish suggested — referencing the parameter names (`typeHole`, `termHole`) would tighten the link between inputs and outputs, but the current text is correct.
